tones.name: Adventurous
tones.guidance: Maintain a forward-moving, action-driven voice with clear stakes and momentum.

tones.name: Mysterious
tones.guidance: Use measured pacing, implication, and sensory details that suggest more than they reveal.

tones.name: Suspenseful
tones.guidance: Use short declarative sentences, tight focus, and close narrative distance.

tones.name: Humorous
tones.guidance: Maintain tonal consistency with lightness while preserving stakes and branch coherence.

tones.name: Spooky
tones.guidance: Sustain eerie atmosphere and mounting unease without losing plot clarity.

tones.name: Epic / Heroic
tones.guidance: Use elevated vocabulary, wider scope, and measured cadence.

tones.name: Curious / Investigative
tones.guidance: Prioritize observation, inference, and discovery-driven progression.

tones.name: Wonder / Exploratory
tones.guidance: Highlight awe, novelty, and world discovery while preserving conflict stakes.

tones.name: Dramatic
tones.guidance: Emphasize character pressure, consequence, and emotional turning points.

tones.name: Heartwarming
tones.guidance: Use compassionate, humane framing without removing meaningful conflict.

tones.name: Hopeful / Inspirational
tones.guidance: Aim for earned uplift through sacrifice, resilience, and credible progress.

tones.name: Whimsical
tones.guidance: Use playful diction, longer flowing sentences, and a lighter narrative presence.

tones.name: Surreal / Strange
tones.guidance: Use unexpected juxtapositions, dream-logic transitions, and matter-of-fact delivery of impossible details.

tones.name: Melancholic
tones.guidance: Use longer reflective sentences with muted imagery, dwelling on absence and memory rather than action.

tones.name: Satirical
tones.guidance: Use precise dry wit, ironic understatement, and detached contrast that exposes absurdity.
